name: Smoked Salmon Stuffed Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut peeled eggs in half lengthwise.
2. Remove egg yolks and mash them with a fork.
3. Mix the mashed yolks with the remaining ingredients: sour cream, mayonnaise, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
4. Cover the mixture and refrigerate until ready to use.
5. Fill each egg white with the salmon mixture.
6. Garnish with paprika.
